description_long: This is a classic ring-shaped donut with a smooth, light golden-brown base and a thick layer of pastel pink icing covering the top half. The icing is decorated with colorful, irregularly shaped sprinkles in red, green, blue, and yellow, giving it a playful and appetizing appearance. The donut has a soft, slightly puffy texture, typical of yeast-raised donuts, and a well-defined central hole. The underside is unglazed, showing the plain baked dough. The surface of the icing appears matte with a subtle sheen, and the sprinkles are embedded into the icing. There is no visible packaging or branding, and the donut is presented unwrapped.
description: A ring-shaped donut with pink icing and colorful sprinkles on top, featuring a soft golden-brown base and a playful, appetizing look.
description_view_0: Top view showing the pink icing with scattered colorful sprinkles and the central hole clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thick, rounded profile and the transition from pink icing to the plain golden-brown dough.
description_view_2: Bottom view displaying the unglazed, smooth golden-brown dough with no icing or sprinkles visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the rounded edge and partial coverage of pink icing and sprinkles.
attribute_icing_type: pink frosted icing with a matte finish and slight sheen
attribute_placement_location: unwrapped, no visible surface or container
